name: write_note
description: Create or update a note file in the knowledge base. The note is saved in the 'notes' subdirectory of a source folder. Use this to save summaries, analysis results, meeting notes, or other generated content.

filename.description: Name for the note file (e.g., 'meeting-summary.md'). Must end with .md, .txt, .org, or .rst.

mode.description: Write mode. 'create': fail if exists. 'append': add to end. 'overwrite': replace content. Default: 'create'.

source_id.description: Source directory ID to write to. If omitted, uses the first available source.
